name: Taylor Christianson
title: Lead Programmer
bio: Lead Programmer and natural team lead with professional experience at Halfbrick Studios.
I consistently take on lead roles across every project I work on — pitching ideas, building prototypes, and driving teams from concept through production.
As Expedition Lead I managed a team of 4, conducting quarterly and annual performance reviews and mentorship alongside my technical responsibilities.
My core expertise is Unity and C#, with generalist experience spanning systems architecture, AI behaviors, game design, mobile optimization, and tool development.
